title: Hedgehog Client
description: A lightweight, feature-rich PVP client built for Minecraft. Get every competitive edge you need — from HUD overlays and movement utilities to exclusive cosmetic cloaks.
body:
# 🦔 Hedgehog Client

> A lightweight, feature-rich PVP client built for Minecraft. Get every competitive edge you need — from HUD overlays and movement utilities to exclusive cosmetic cloaks.

---

## ⚡ Modules

Hedgehog Client ships with **14 built-in modules**, all configurable and toggleable in-game:

| Module | Description |
|---|---|
| **Toggle Sprint** | Automatically sprint without holding the key |
| **KeyStrokes** | Display your key inputs on screen |
| **FPS Counter** | Real-time frames-per-second overlay |
| **Freelook** | Look around without moving your camera direction |
| **Fullbright** | Max brightness — no more stumbling in the dark |
| **CPS Counter** | Track your clicks per second |
| **Zoom** | Smooth, optifine-style zoom |
| **Ping** | Live ping display on your HUD |
| **Armor HUD** | Always know your durability at a glance |
| **Coordinates** | On-screen XYZ coordinate display |
| **Hurtcam** | Toggle the screen shake when you take damage |
| **Motion Blur** | Smooth, cinematic motion blur effect |
| **Waypoints** | Mark and navigate to custom locations |
| **Speed** | Display your current movement speed |

---

## 🎭 Cosmetics — Exclusive Cloaks

Show off your style with **4 exclusive Hedgehog Client cloaks**, unlockable in-game:

- 🎥 **YouTube** — For the content creators out there
- ☯️ **Yin Yang** — Balance and style in one
- 🕶️ **Gangster** — The Gangster Hedgehog cloak
- 🦔 **Hedgehog Client** — Rep the client with pride

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/)
2. Download Hedgehog Client from this page
3. Drop the `.jar` into your `mods` folder
4. Launch and enjoy!

---

*Built with love for the PVP community. More modules and cosmetics coming soon!*
